name: Mega Sour Bubblegum 100g
description: Are sour candies never quite sour enough for you?! Do you LOVE that lip-puckering, tear-inducing feeling of a sour lolly? Well, you will not be disappointed with these! They are EXTREMELY sour (we are not messing around here!) and it is highly recommended not to eat more then one at a time. Buy Mega Sour Bubblegum online.
